name: paperclip-local
description: Operate a local Paperclip instance through the bundled MCP server and operator skill.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a named local Paperclip instance.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the repo-local Paperclip MCP server with an operator skill for companies, issues, approvals, plugins, context, import/export, and diagnostics against one named local Paperclip instance.
defaultPrompt: Check the status of my local Paperclip instance
List local Paperclip plugins and inspect one
Export a company package from this instance
